name: Scene Timeline Demo
description: Declarative show-clock demo mirroring what create_scene_timeline (Layer-1, v0.7.0) builds: a Timer CHOP playhead drives a 3-scene segments table (intro / drop / outro), with crossfaded visual sources picked by the playhead's normalized position. The final output blends Scene A↔B↔C as t_norm sweeps 0→1. Offline-validated against RecipeSchema; live cook-check UNVERIFIED pending TD run.

nodes.name: playhead
nodes.comment: Show-clock playhead. 30s total, looping. cycleLimit=0 → no auto-stop.

nodes.name: playhead_null
nodes.comment: Stable channel ref for downstream bind_to_channel ('timer_seconds', 'timer_fraction').

nodes.name: segments
nodes.comment: Declarative segments: idx,name,cue,start,end,morph_in,slot. Matches tdmcp_scenes shape from create_scene_timeline.

nodes.name: sceneA
nodes.comment: Scene A (intro): slow mono noise field.

nodes.name: fadeAB
nodes.comment: Scene A→B crossfader. Driven manually from the playhead's t_norm via the Cross knob.

nodes.name: fadeBC
nodes.comment: Scene B→C crossfader. Chained after fadeAB.

preview_description: A 30-second show clock blending three scenes: a slow mono noise field (intro) fading into a radial ramp (drop) then settling on a deep violet hold (outro), with playhead transport knobs exposed.
